mapper.select: SELECT b.*, c.name as category_name FROM books b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT b.*, c.name as category_name FROM books b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.isbn = #{isbn}
SELECT b.*, c.name as category_name FROM books b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books (isbn, title, author, publisher, category_id, price, stock, available, cover_url, description, publish_date, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{available}, #{coverUrl}, #{description}, #{publishDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE books SET isbn = #{isbn}, title = #{title}, author = #{author}, publisher = #{publisher}, category_id = #{categoryId}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, available = #{available}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, description = #{description}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE books SET stock = #{stock}, available = #{available}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
